api_key_selection_expression.description: Specifies the key selection expression for API key validation, used to determine which request header or query string parameter to use for identifying the API key.

aws_apigatewayv2_api_version.description: Specifies the API version for the AWS API Gateway v2, typically "HTTP" or "WEBSOCKET".

body.description: Defines the OpenAPI specification for the API, provided as a JSON or YAML string. Required for creating an HTTP or WebSocket API.

cors_configuration.description: Defines the Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) settings for the API, including allowed origins, methods, headers, and other related configurations.
cors_configuration.type: list(object({allow_credentials: optional(bool),allow_headers: optional(list(string)),allow_methods: optional(list(string)),allow_origins: optional(list(string)),expose_headers: optional(list(string)),max_age: optional(number)}))

credentials_arn.description: Specifies the ARN of an IAM role that API Gateway uses to invoke the integration, required for AWS service integrations.

description.description: Defines the description of the API Gateway resource, providing details about its purpose or functionality. Optional and can be up to 1024 characters.

disable_execute_api_endpoint.description: Specifies whether clients can invoke the API directly via the default endpoint. Set to true to disable the default endpoint.

fail_on_warnings.description: Determines whether API creation should proceed if warnings are generated; set to true to fail on warnings.

name.description: Specifies the name of the API, which must be unique within the AWS account and region.

protocol_type.description: Defines the protocol for the API, such as HTTP or WEBSOCKET, which determines the type of API created.

route_key.description: Specifies the key used to identify the route, typically in the format "HTTP method:path".

route_selection_expression.description: Defines the selection expression used by the API Gateway to determine which route matches an incoming request, required for WebSocket APIs.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the API Gateway resource for organization, billing, or other purposes; optional.

target.description: Specifies the integration target endpoint for the API, such as an AWS Lambda function URI, VPC link, or HTTP URL.
